Class ServiceLocator

java.lang.Object
edu.desu.cis.robot.core.services.ServiceLocator
public class ServiceLocator extends Object
A simple service locator pattern implementation for registering and retrieving services. This class provides a centralized way to manage service instances, making them accessible throughout the application.

  • Method Details

    • register

      public static <T> void register(Class<T> clazz, T service)
      Registers a service with the service locator.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The type of the service.
      Parameters:
      clazz - The class type of the service to register.
      service - The instance of the service to register.

    • get

      public static <T> T get(Class<T> clazz)
      Retrieves a registered service by its class type.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The type of the service.
      Parameters:
      clazz - The class type of the service to retrieve.
      Returns:
      The instance of the registered service.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if no service is registered for the given class type.
